arguments.argument:
/* Bullet behavior 0: [Start] Bullet is shot straight ahead without line of sight to player. 1: [>>>>>] Bullet has found vertical line of sight with player. (Will find horizontal next) 2: [Start] Bullet is shot with line of sight to player. (Will not use vertical/horizontal tracking behavior) 5: [>>>>>] Bullet has bounced off wall at least once. 10: [>>>>>] Bullet has gone through at least 2 tracks or bounces. */ event_inherited() setCollisionBounds(-3,-3,3,3)
//Enemy base statistics bShowHealthBar=false bShowDamage=false bCanTakeDamage=false hitWall=0 breakFix=0
